name: Four Second Forever
short_description: You have four seconds to dress a chinchilla as a cowboy, pluck legs off a horse, and prevent the dolphins from taking over
detailed_description:
You have four seconds to dress a chinchilla as a cowboy, pluck legs off a horse, and prevent the dolphins from taking over

Four Second Forever is the energy of a blender with far too much in it, vibrating towards the edge of the counter to fall at any moment. With minigames each with progressive difficulty, the evolution of Four Second Forever comes from millions of plays from the original web series of Four Second Fury, Frenzy, and Firestorm.

- Back-to-back fever of games
- Progressive difficulty ramping
- A boss battle! Hooray for closure and little minions that have blinking weakpoints!
- A lot of animals, much more than the previous games
- 25 really, really dumb game ideas, each with their own difficulty

So when you're ready (and only WHEN), put on your chef's hat, grab your frying pan, and get ready to pluck some horse legs!

This project is part of The Time of Good Things, a game made every month (or so!). All the games in this series are shorter experiences (minutes, not hours!), so purchase accordingly!
